title: About Us | Senate Publishing
text_excerpt: About Us | Senate Publishing Senate Publishing Home About Us Newsletter Sign up Meet the Team Publications Partner Publications Specialist Publications News Contact What We Do One of Europe’s leading media services companies, Senate Publishing offers comprehensive, full-spectrum publishing and communications solutions including: hard copy and digital media physical and virtual events, conferences and exhibitions customised media engagement comprising promotional campaigns (strategy, creative content and delivery), press conferences, briefings and calibrated messaging Senate Publishing's five decades of successful partnership with a global cohort of public- and private-sector organisations is testimony to the company’s professional integrity, accrued expertise and a fundamental commitment to fully understanding and meeting clients’ needs in an overall framework of collaborative media innovation. Senate Publishing's closely integrated editorial, creative, production and distribution staff are leaders in their field of hard copy and digital expertise. The company’s specialist team of media and communications advisors and managers are experienced practitioners with long track records of working with government and industry at the highest level. The event team are equally experienced in planning and managing all manner of media occasions' from large conferences to discreet networking dinners. All teams share a common commitment to working closely and effectively with clients to maximize the impact of media products and initiatives, while minimising client time and resource requirements. Our History Lord David Evans, Chairman of Senate Publishing, and Caroline Minshell, the company's CEO, have enjoyed a media business partnership spanning 35 years. Their association began at Centurion Press, a company founded by Lord Evans in 1971, which became one of the largest and most prestigious print management and publishing concerns in Europe, with offices in Amsterdam, Hasselt, Dusseldorf, Birmingham and London. Our Values SMART ̶ Working smart means we ensure your vision is communicated not only with the correct tools, but with fitting sponsors that will truly maximise your impact to an engaged and relevant audience HONEST ̶ Transparency is key when working in such close collaboration. We are trustworthy and open with all our clients, breeding a warm and creative atmosphere for all involved RELIABLE ̶ Stringency is vital in the publishing industry to provide slick content and engaging design to meet vital deadlines. You don’t need to worry about that though, that is our job CARING ̶ Having led a number of companies in the past, we know how precious your brand is to you. We’ll always be mindful of your priorities and concerns, so we are truly reflective of your character and ethos INNOVATIVE ̶ In a rapidly evolving market, innovation is vital to stay ahead of the competition. We strive to be at the forefront of publishing ideas and technologies to ensure your brand keeps pace with the latest developments and trends +44 (0) 20 7723 9825 info@senatepublishing.co.uk Contact Sitemap Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Cookie Policy Newsletter Signup Twitter Google+ LinkedIn Website Designed & Developed by Magnetize Cheltenham Copyright ©2026 Senate Publishing.
